message:
feat(fp-frame): add dt.ceil/floor, groupby dropna, sample_weights

- DatetimeAccessor::ceil/floor(freq): round datetimes to D/h/min/s
- DataFrameGroupBy: add dropna field, groupby_full_options method
- DataFrame::sample_weights: weighted row sampling with LCG RNG

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
